final:
module sram_16bit (  
    input clk,  
    input we,  
    input [3:0] addr,  
    input [15:0] din,  
    output reg [15:0] dout  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory [0:15]; // 16x16-bit memory  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (we) begin  
            memory[addr] <= din; // Write to memory  
        end  
        dout <= memory[addr]; // Read from memory  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      dout <= 16'hFFFF;
    end
  end

endmodule
